arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd play Leicester in the Premier League on Sunday and we'll bring you live match updates from Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'to battle' Man United for Sporting Lisbon star who has thrived under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to battle Manchester United for Ousmane Diomande's signature during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sorting out one player will be key to making a fast start as Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Portuguese coach Ruben Amorim starts work at Old Trafford and top of his packed in-tray will be the startling drop-off in Marcus Rashford's form over the past year and a half

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford discovers England fate after private talks with Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford was once again left out of the latest England squad, but he has been in contact with incoming head coach Thomas Tuchel

arts.ttl: Man United 'want next Martin Odegaard' as Ruben Amorim 'gives green light' to move for teenage sensation
arts.sum: Incoming Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly desperate for his new club to win the race for Rosenborg teenager Sverre Nypan.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United vs Leicester City Premier League clash is not on TV
arts.sum: Just a week-and-a-half after their last trip to Old Trafford, Leicester City return to the same Stadium this weekend as they take on Manchester United. However, fans in the UK won’t be able to watch the match at Old Trafford live on TV, here’s why.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United game vs Leicester City isn't on TV as Sky Sports selections explained
arts.sum: Man Utd will resume their Premier League push against Leicester City on Sunday afternoon - but that game is not being shown live on TV.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United host Leicester City in the Premier League this weekend as Ruud van Nistelrooy takes charge for the final time. Van Nistelrooy’s four-game spell as interim manager will end after the visit of the Foxes, with Ruben Amorim to take official charge from November 11th. The fixture is a rematch of Van Nistelrooy’s first […] The post Manchester United vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Man Utd’s January and summer transfer plans
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says that he will not sign any Sporting Lisbon players in January but has opened the door to sign them in the summer. “I will not sign any Sporting player at Man United in January… then, what happens in the summer I don’t know," Amorim said.
